name: Rose Powder
description: Soothing floral powder for a refreshed, radiant complexion.
dosage: Mix 1-2 tsp with rose water; apply 10-15 minutes, then rinse.

name: Multani Mitti Powder
description: Deep-cleansing clay that helps clarify and balance the skin.
dosage: Mix 1-2 tsp with water; apply 10-12 minutes, then rinse.

name: Beetroot Powder
description: Antioxidant-rich powder that adds a healthy glow.
dosage: Mix 1 tsp with yogurt or honey; apply 10 minutes, then rinse.

name: Herbal Shampoo Powder
description: Gentle cleansing blend for a soft, balanced scalp.
dosage: Mix with water into a paste; apply 2-3 minutes, then rinse.

name: Hibiscus Powder
description: Nourishing floral powder for strong, glossy hair.
dosage: Mix 1-2 tbsp with water; apply 20 minutes, then rinse.

name: Amla Powder
description: Classic Ayurvedic powder for stronger roots and shine.
dosage: Mix 1-2 tbsp with water; apply 20 minutes, then rinse.

name: Orange Peel Powder
description: Brightening citrus powder for smoother, clearer skin.
dosage: Mix 1 tsp with water; apply 8-10 minutes, then rinse.

name: Rice Powder
description: Fine powder for gentle polishing and a soft finish.
dosage: Mix 1 tsp with milk or water; apply 10 minutes, then rinse.

name: Aloe Vera Powder
description: Cooling, hydrating powder for calm, balanced skin.
dosage: Mix 1 tsp with water; apply 10-12 minutes, then rinse.

name: Triphala Powder
description: Traditional blend to support daily balance and vitality.
dosage: Mix 1 tsp in warm water once daily or as directed.

name: Bhringraj Powder
description: Ayurvedic hair powder for stronger, healthier strands.
dosage: Mix 1-2 tbsp with water; apply 20 minutes, then rinse.

name: Henna Powder
description: Natural conditioning powder for fuller, healthier hair.
dosage: Mix with water; apply 30-45 minutes, then rinse.

name: Indigo Powder
description: Botanical powder for natural tone and scalp balance.
dosage: Mix with warm water; apply 30 minutes, then rinse.
